data.title: audit: normalize skogai-caveman `adversarial-review` skill
data.description:
Repo: `/home/skogix/.local/src/marketplace/plugins/skogai-caveman`

Audit `skills/adversarial-review/SKILL.md` against the current repo-local skill quality bar.

Scope:

* review routing clarity and structure
* check for stale assumptions, legacy paths, or drift from repo conventions
* ensure downstream use from the autonomous loop is clear
* document any missing references/templates/scripts that would reduce monolithic [SKILL.md](<http://SKILL.md>) content

Done when the remaining cleanup and normalization work for this skill is clearly captured.
